steps.title: Map the logical relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1: resins play several important roles. Sentence 2: gives a specific role — sealing wounds to keep insects/fungi out.

steps.title: Pick the matching transition
steps.content:
"For example" introduces an illustrative instance — exactly what the second sentence does. "Regardless" and "However" signal contrast; "Next" implies sequencing of separate actions.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
